# What's New - UI/UX and Gameplay Update

## Visual Changes You'll Notice

### 1. Menu Screen Improvements

**Year Preset Buttons**
- **Before**: Text cut off \("2008 cr"\), hard to read
- **After**: Full text \("2008 Crisis"\) in white, no truncation

**Unlock Shop**
- **Before**: Categories in random order
- **After**: Stock Sectors at the very top for easy access

**Shop Prerequisites**
- **Before**: Could click locked items, confusing what's actually available
- **After**: Blocked nodes show ⛓️ icon and "Requires: [Name]" - crystal clear!

**Prestige Costs**
- **Before**: Weird progression \(too expensive early, too cheap late\)
- **After**: Smooth curve - first unlocks cost 0.5-2 PP, endgame costs 40+ PP

### 2. In-Game Screen Improvements

**Stock Search Area**
- **Before**: Category dropdown and search input cramped on same line
- **After**: Dropdown on line 1 \(full width\), search on line 2 \(full width\)

**Category Filter**
- **Before**: Dropdown reset to "All Categories" every day \(annoying!\)
- **After**: Stays on your selected category throughout the run

**Chart Date Labels**
- **Before**: "Jan 15" - no year \(confusing in multi-year runs\)
- **After**: "Jan '08" - includes year so you know where you are

### 3. End Screen Improvements

**Run Summary**
- **Before**: Text too big, aligned weird, no scrolling for long stats
- **After**: Smaller text \(18px\), centered properly, scrollable container

### 4. Gameplay Changes

**SEC Arrest System**
- **Before**: Arrest ALWAYS at exactly 100% \(predictable, boring\)
- **After**: Random arrest between 60-100% each run! Sometimes 65%, sometimes 90%
  - Guaranteed arrest at 95%+ \(can't push luck too far\)
  - Makes illegal actions more thrilling - you never know when you'll get caught

**Risk Management**
- **Already Working**: Getting fired at 100% risk \(no changes needed\)

## New Cost Structure

### Early Game \(First 1-2 Runs\)
- Leverage 2x: 0.5 PP ⭐ \(was 1 PP\)
- Reduced Fees I: 1 PP ⭐ \(was 2 PP\)
- Finance Sector: 2 PP ⭐ \(was 3 PP\)

### Basic \(Runs 3-5\)
- Healthcare Sector: 3 PP
- Leverage 5x: 3 PP
- More Positions: 4 PP
- Industrials Sector: 5 PP

### Mid Game \(Runs 6-12\)
- Energy Sector: 6 PP
- PAC Access: 6 PP
- Trust Fund: 6 PP
- Tech Sector: 8 PP ⭐ \(was 8 PP - unchanged\)
- Insider Network: 8 PP
- Reduced Fees II: 8 PP ⭐ \(was 5 PP - more valuable\)

### Late Game \(Runs 13+\)
- Leverage 10x: 15 PP ⭐ \(was 8 PP - better gated\)
- Hedge Fund Access: 15 PP
- Reduced Fees III: 18 PP ⭐ \(was 10 PP\)
- Meme Stocks: 20 PP ⭐ \(was 10 PP - more exclusive\)
- Low Profile II: 20 PP ⭐ \(was 10 PP\)
- Fund Manager: 25 PP ⭐ \(was 20 PP\)
- Rich Parents: 25 PP ⭐ \(was 15 PP\)

### Endgame \(Veteran Players\)
- Leverage 50x: 40 PP ⭐ \(was 20 PP - properly gated now!\)

⭐ = Cost changed from previous version

## Why These Changes?

### Better Progression
- **Early unlocks are now accessible**: After first run, you can buy something meaningful
- **Late game stays challenging**: Degenerate leverage \(50x\) now requires serious dedication
- **Natural curve**: Costs scale exponentially, not randomly

### More Dynamic Gameplay
- **SEC arrest randomization**: Every run feels different - can't just memorize "stop at 99%"
- **Category persistence**: Less micromanagement, more focus on trading
- **Visual clarity**: Blocked nodes are obviously blocked, no confusion

### Quality of Life
- **Year labels on charts**: Know when you are in multi-year runs
- **Better search layout**: More space for both category and search
- **Scrollable end screen**: See all your stats without cutting off

## How to Test

1. **Start Fresh**: Consider resetting save to see early game balance
2. **Check Shop**: Open unlock shop, verify Stock Sectors at top, blocked nodes show chain
3. **Play a Run**: 
   - Select category, verify it stays selected
   - Check chart dates show years
   - Use illegal actions, see if you get arrested before 100%
4. **Complete Run**: Check end screen is readable and centered
5. **Multiple Runs**: Observe different arrest thresholds each time

## Feedback Welcome

If you notice:
- Costs feel too expensive/cheap
- SEC arrests too frequent/rare
- UI elements misaligned
- Any bugs or issues

Please report them!
